news.title: Residential burglary ends in hours-long standoff
news.summary: A home burglary in Clayton County led to an hours-long standoff after a suspect barricaded herself inside the home.

news.title: Jonesboro burglary standoff: 3 suspects arrested after SWAT response
news.summary: Three people face felony charges following a residential burglary that sparked a massive SWAT response and street closures in Jonesboro.

news.title: DeKalb County Jail inmate death: 73-year-old man dies in custody
news.summary: An investigation is underway after jail officials found a 73-year-old man unresponsive inside his housing unit at the DeKalb County Jail.

news.title: Argument leads to gunfire leaving 18-year-old injured in Atlanta
news.summary: An 18-year-old man is recovering at an area hospital after being shot just after midnight Sunday in Atlanta.

news.title: Suspect arrested for malice murder in DeKalb County shooting, sheriff says
news.summary: Isaiah Turner, 20, is in custody, charged with malice murder in the March shooting death of Jamar Schaffers, according to the DeKalb County Sheriff's Office.
